title: Translation Dictionary
description: Schema for config/jp-en-dictionary.json and config/cn-en-dictionary.json. Validates Go terminology translation dictionaries with categorized term mappings, metadata, and optional character aliases.

Metadata.description: Dictionary metadata. Describes the dictionary's purpose, version, and provenance.

last_updated.description: Date of last modification in YYYY-MM-DD format

usage.description: Describes the intended usage context for this dictionary

language.description: Source language code: ja (Japanese) or zh (Chinese)

reviewed_by.description: Name or identifier of the person who reviewed the translations

total_terms.description: Total number of translation terms across all categories

Aliases.description: Character-level aliases for normalization (e.g., traditional-to-simplified Chinese mappings). Each key is a source string and each value is its normalized replacement.

CategoryMapping.description: A category of translation terms. Keys are source-language terms, values are their English translations.
